body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/delete 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/delete 
 ## 接口描述 
根据项目自增id删除项目信息 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectInf","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectSeqId","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","required":true,"maxLength":"20","desc":"%20%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%AB%AF%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"0"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ###请求示例
` {BaseURL}/api/v1/project/delete?OPAUID=XFT00001`
```json
{
  "projectSeqId": 0
}
```

###返回示例
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| **错误码** | **错误描述**        | **备注**                       |
|-----------|-------------------|-------------------------------|
| 200      | 成功                 | 无                            |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/delete

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/delete

接口描述

根据项目自增id删除项目信息

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectInf","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E5%AF%B9%E8%B1%A1","required":true},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectSeqId","label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","required":true,"maxLength":"20","desc":"%20%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E7%AB%AF%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9EID","exampleValue":"0"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E6%A0%87%E8%AF%86","exampleValue":"XFT00001"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","label":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E6%A0%87%E5%BF%97","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

###请求示例 {BaseURL}/api/v1/project/delete?OPAUID=XFT00001

{
  "projectSeqId": 0
}

###返回示例

{
  "success": true,
  "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误描述 备注
200 成功 无
